Phase definition: Define reusable taxonomy, data contracts, risk tiers, and done criteria across apps.
Tools: Architecture inventory scripts; rg; route extractors; schema validators
Executed actions: Lock scope per app/component; define source/hop/sink/lineage semantics; define event vocabulary and DB contracts.
Completion checks: All required fields/enums finalized; app onboarding checklist complete; no ambiguous terms remain.
Pitfall indicators: Conflicting terminology across teams; changing schema mid-run; unclear ownership.
Other: Multi-app baseline. Magento is first adopter but contracts are framework-agnostic.

Phase definition: Independently taint-map reusable components (frameworks, plugins, JS libs, SDKs, DB adapters) without full app traffic tracing.
Tools: AST instrumentor; CodeQL; Semgrep taint mode; Joern; unit/synthetic harnesses
Executed actions: Discover functions; inject probes/hooks; run static taint and synthetic component tests; generate component map artifacts.
Completion checks: Scope lock pass; instrumentation coverage target met; critical chokepoints present.
Pitfall indicators: Overclaiming completeness from static results only; missing dynamic dispatch paths; plugin interception blind spots.
Other: Build once, reuse across many apps. Strong speed-up lever.

Phase definition: Verify each component pack is reliable and reusable.
Tools: Synthetic deterministic tests; negative controls; reproducibility checks; schema contract tests
Executed actions: Run tainted and non-tainted synthetic cases; validate parent-child taint links through transforms; compare repeated runs.
Completion checks: Coverage threshold met (e.g., >=98% function instrumentation, 100% critical chokepoints); deterministic run stability within tolerance.
Pitfall indicators: High false positives; unstable counts; broken transform chains.
Other: Pack marked Certified/Conditional/Failed before registry publication.

Phase definition: Store certified packs with compatibility metadata for cross-app reuse.
Tools: Artifact registry (S3/GCS/Artifactory); metadata index; checksum tools
Executed actions: Publish pack + manifest + cert report; index by version, framework version, language, and confidence.
Completion checks: All packs have provenance, hash, version, compat matrix, and rollback reference.
Pitfall indicators: Unversioned packs; drift between runtime code and pack version.

Phase definition: Map app-specific routes/endpoints/schemas and boundary assets without deep replay.
Tools: Route parsers; OpenAPI/GraphQL schema parsers; sitemap extractors; rg
Executed actions: Extract HTTP routes, workers, queues, webhooks, CLI entrypoints; classify auth contexts and actor reachability.
Completion checks: All known entrypoint types captured; actor contexts assigned; no unknown route families.
Pitfall indicators: Missing async consumers; missing admin-only paths; undocumented internal APIs.
Other: Use same process for Magento and future apps.

Phase definition: Compose app map by merging certified component packs with app-specific glue code and static findings.
Tools: Lineage composer; graph merge engine; SQLite/Neo4j loaders
Executed actions: Join component nodes/edges with app routes/controllers/templates/services; annotate edge provenance (pack vs app).
Completion checks: No orphan high-value nodes; provenance tags complete; sink contexts populated.
Pitfall indicators: Namespace mismatches; edge duplication; contradictory sink typing.
Other: This is the default fast mode replacing full traffic tracing as primary path.

Phase definition: Run small replay set to confirm critical composed joins and de-risk dynamic behavior.
Tools: Playwright; MFTF; API replay runner; synthetic taint requests
Executed actions: Execute 5-20 high-value flows per app/module; verify source->boundary->sink links for critical chains only.
Completion checks: Preflight pass; required event vocabulary observed; critical joins confirmed or explicitly downgraded.
Pitfall indicators: Using full crawl by default (slow); no preflight; stale environment/config differences.
Other: Minimal runtime verification keeps speed while preserving trust.

Phase definition: Capture real production-like traffic safely for later replay and map deepening.
Tools: NGINX/Envoy access logs; OpenTelemetry collectors; Kafka/PubSub taps; New Relic transaction traces; APM span export
Executed actions: Record request metadata, headers/body subsets, route params, timing, actor context, and downstream call graph metadata.
Completion checks: Sampling policy documented; sensitive fields policy applied; replay-required fields present; capture completeness score passes.
Pitfall indicators: Missing correlation IDs; payload truncation; no downstream span linkage.
Other: Tools that can record traffic for replay: Envoy tap, NGINX logs + body mirror, AWS ALB logs + app logs, OTel collector, New Relic trace/span export, commercial API gateways (Kong/Apigee) traffic logs.

Phase definition: Replay captured traffic in isolated environment to deepen coverage and map hidden paths.
Tools: Shadow/staging replay harness; tcpcopy/goreplay (GoReplay); custom HTTP/API replayers; queue replay tools
Executed actions: Normalize captured traffic; rehydrate auth/session tokens in test env; replay by cohort; collect runtime events and service spans.
Completion checks: Replay success rate threshold met; critical error budget respected; map coverage delta positive.
Pitfall indicators: Non-idempotent actions not sandboxed; broken auth/session recreation; environment skew.
Other: For async systems replay queue payloads too (Kafka/SQS/Rabbit) with deterministic ordering windows.

Phase: Phase 8: Cross-Service Flow Mapping (New Relic + OTel)
Phase definition: Add service-to-service lineage across internal APIs, queues, and external dependencies.
Tools: New Relic APM/Distributed Tracing/Service Map; OpenTelemetry traces
Executed actions: Ingest span graphs; correlate app taint chains with service edges via trace IDs and route/resource names.
Completion checks: Each critical lineage has service-edge context where applicable; unresolved service hops listed.
Pitfall indicators: Trace sampling too low; missing trace propagation headers; clock skew across services.
Other: New Relic gives service graph + transaction traces; use it to tie sources/sinks across services and prioritize verification targets.

Phase definition: Reconcile static, composed, runtime-min, replay, and service-map results.
Executed actions: Classify findings into CONFIRMED/SUSPECTED/STATIC_ONLY/RUNTIME_ONLY/CONTRADICTED; generate gap worklist.
Completion checks: No unresolved critical contradictions; high-risk paths have final status.
Pitfall indicators: Treating STATIC_ONLY as true positives by default; ignoring runtime-only evidence.
Other: AI triage focuses here for maximum analyst leverage.

Phase definition: Use agents to make sense of result sets, detect tool bugs, and propose targeted fixes.
Tools: LLM agent + deterministic validators; SQL checks; schema linters
Executed actions: Summarize evidence per lineage; detect impossible states; identify suspected tool bugs/hook failures; propose next 1-2 highest ROI fixes.
Completion checks: Every AI claim linked to concrete evidence rows/files; no unsupported assertions.
Pitfall indicators: Hallucinated routes/findings; no provenance links; overconfident confidence scoring.
Other: Guardrail: require evidence-linked outputs only (row IDs, file paths, trace IDs).

Phase definition: Close top-ranked gaps quickly with targeted hook/replay updates.
Tools: Instrumentation patches; focused replays; automated regression checks
Executed actions: Apply minimal changes; rerun only affected flow cohorts; measure confidence and coverage deltas.
Completion checks: Stop rule met: diminishing returns or target confidence/coverage reached.
Pitfall indicators: Large unfocused reruns; changing many variables per iteration.
Other: Typical cadence: 1-3 focused iterations per app/module slice.

Phase definition: Freeze reusable map artifacts for org-wide sharing and downstream security analysis.
Tools: Packaging scripts; integrity/FK checks; vocabulary alignment checks
Executed actions: Bundle runtime/appmap/correlation/manifest/provenance; run integrity checks; publish immutable snapshot.
Completion checks: Integrity check OK; FK checks clean; vocabulary alignment pass; provenance complete.
Pitfall indicators: Snapshot missing manifest; inconsistent counts between reports and DB.
Other: Designed for merging with existing instrumentation and future production replay runs.

Phase definition: Templatize onboarding so new apps can run the same pipeline with minimal custom work.
Tools: Onboarding templates; pack compatibility matrix; scheduler/orchestrator
Executed actions: Create per-app config only (routes, auth, replay adapters); reuse certified packs; schedule async pack refresh + app runs.
Completion checks: New app can run end-to-end without custom schema changes.
Pitfall indicators: Per-app snowflake logic; no shared contracts; no version pinning.
Other: This is the long-term scale mechanism for org-wide adoption beyond Magento.
